{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7545207609874121497","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说这本书呢，是天灾文吧？看着看着好像又不是，看到最后，感觉全球好像就他这一个基地，一点都没遇到其他基地的人，一个基地也大概维持在1000人左右，然后就以主角为这个基地的人，把地球救了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756765446,"group_id":"7525699975443909657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzuU9cujNesqU5JmEhB+BoQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ae9e321b18b347ceb6a7412a5a4d232f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708067&x-signature=M2U4LMExrNdSal8%2BYX0QxMoa0h4%3D","user_id":"98139099802","user_name":"本宅女就是我"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98139099802","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7525699975443909657","book_info":{"abstract":"天灾突然降临，整个世界陷入了恐慌，下大暴雨的第一天打工族庆幸不用上班，学生庆幸不用上学，一连下了半个月大雨丝毫没有停下来的意思，整个城市已经看不见那宽大的马路了，家里的物资见底，人们这才开始慌了起来。
你以为就仅仅是天灾这么简单吗，后续还会有极昼、极夜、，极寒雪怪、极寒结束之后迎来的却是更大的阴谋，极阴世界的融合。
人类基地再一次迎来了大挑战。随之而来的一串联打击人类的未来还有希望吗？
让我们伴随着杨逍的视角一起来看看在这个吃人的世界里要如何生存下去。
而我们的主角就是一个刚出社会的打工仔，因为父母出车祸去世所以他只能带着弟弟妹妹住在远离市中心的老城区，当然是因为这里便宜。
没有异能，没有金手指，且看男主如何在这种环境下带着弟弟妹妹活下去
本文内容全属虚构请勿当真，希望大家喜欢。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o150f1ac0dbb107cc3654d9f3d9b3b203~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"客厅特工杨小喵","author_id":"","book_id":"7525699975443909657","book_name":"天灾末日降临，人类团结共存亡","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7525700025209324057","read_count":"4","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"138358"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"39","tags":"科幻末世,末日求生,囤物资,求生,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o150f1ac0dbb107cc3654d9f3d9b3b203~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779332569&x-signature=7lQIGZ2I%2F8xzrX0xOFxOsU0m7Og%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"886646552672131","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"38"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6714,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":78},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_typ
